pokemon:jigglypuff.name: Jigglypuff
pokemon:jigglypuff.summary: When this Pokémon sings, it never pauses to breathe. If it is in a battle against an opponent that does not easily fall asleep, Jigglypuff cannot breathe, endangering its life.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When this Pokémon sings, it never pauses to breathe. If it is in a battle against an opponent that does not easily fall asleep, Jigglypuff cannot breathe, endangering its life.
When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
Looking into its cute, round eyes makes it start singing a song so pleasant listeners can’t help but fall asleep.
When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
It rolls its cute eyes as it sings a soothing lullaby. Its gentle song puts anyone who hears it to sleep.
When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
Nothing can avoid falling asleep hearing a JIGGLYPUFF’s song. The sound waves of its singing voice match the brain waves of someone in a deep sleep.
It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.
If it inflates to SING a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.
If it inflates to sing a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.
When its huge eyes waver, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
Uses its cute round eyes to enrapture its foe. It then sings a pleasing melody that lulls the foe to sleep.
Uses its cute round eyes to enrapture its foe. It then sings a pleasing melody that lulls the foe to sleep.
Jigglypuff possess a vocal range that exceeds 12 octaves, but each individual’s singing skill depends on its own effort.
Jigglypuff’s vocal cords can freely adjust the wavelength of its voice. This Pokémon uses this ability to sing at precisely the right wavelength to make its foes most drowsy.
When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.
JIGGLYPUFF’s vocal chords can freely adjust the wavelength of its voice. This POKéMON uses this ability to sing at precisely the right wavelength to make its foes most drowsy.
When this POKéMON sings, it never pauses to breathe. If it is in a battle against an opponent that does not easily fall asleep, JIGGLYPUFF cannot breathe, endangering its life.
By freely changing the wavelength of its voice, Jigglypuff sings a mysterious melody sure to make any listener sleepy.
Looking into its cute, round eyes causes it to sing a relaxing melody, inducing its enemies to sleep.
Looking into its cute, round eyes causes it to sing a relaxing melody, inducing its enemies to sleep.
It hugely inflates its stomach and sings a mysterious melody. If you hear this melody, you’ll become sleepy right away.
Jigglypuff has top-notch lung capacity, even by comparison to other Pokémon. It won’t stop singing its lullabies until its foes fall asleep.
The songs they sing are totally different depending on the region they live in. Some even sound like they’re shouting!
Recordings of Jigglypuff’s strange lullabies can be purchased from department stores. These CDs can be found near the bedding area.
When it wavers its big, round eyes, it begins singing a lullaby that makes everyone drowsy.
Looking into its cute, round eyes makes it start singing a song so pleasant listeners can’t help but fall asleep.
It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.
If it inflates to sing a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience.
Uses its alluring eyes to enrapture its foe. It then sings a pleasing melody that lulls the foe to sleep.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When this Pokémon sings, it never pauses to breathe. If it is in a battle against an opponent that does not easily fall asleep, Jigglypuff cannot breathe, endangering its life.

pokemon:wigglytuff.name: Wigglytuff
pokemon:wigglytuff.summary: Wigglytuff’s body is very flexible. By inhaling deeply, this Pokémon can inflate itself seemingly without end. Once inflated, Wigglytuff bounces along lightly like a balloon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Wigglytuff’s body is very flexible. By inhaling deeply, this Pokémon can inflate itself seemingly without end. Once inflated, Wigglytuff bounces along lightly like a balloon.
Its fine fur feels sublime to the touch. It can expand its body by inhaling air.
Its fine fur feels so pleasant, those who accidentally touch it cannot take their hands away.
The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
The rich, fluffy fur that covers its body feels so good that anyone who feels it can't stop touching it.
Its fine fur feels sublime to the touch. It can expand its body by inhaling air.
Its fur is the ultimate in luxuriousness. Sleeping alongside a WIGGLYTUFF is simply divine. Its body expands seemingly without end when it inhales.
Its fur is extremely fine, dense, and supple. The exquisitely pleasant fur conveys an image of luxury.
Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won't want to be separated.
Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won’t want to be separated.
The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
Its body is very elastic. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to inflate itself without limit.
Its body is very elastic. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to inflate itself without limit.
As it inhales, it expands...and expands...and expands. Wigglytuff compete to see which one can inflate itself the most.
Wigglytuff has large, saucerlike eyes. The surfaces of its eyes are always covered with a thin layer of tears. If any dust gets in this Pokémon’s eyes, it is quickly washed away.
Its fine fur feels sublime to the touch. It can expand its body by inhaling air.
Its fine fur feels sublime to the touch. It can expand its body by inhaling air.
The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
WIGGLYTUFF has large, saucerlike eyes. The surfaces of its eyes are always covered with a thin layer of tears. If any dust gets in this POKéMON’s eyes, it is quickly washed away.
WIGGLYTUFF’s body is very flexible. By inhaling deeply, this POKéMON can inflate itself seemingly without end. Once inflated, WIGGLYTUFF bounces along lightly like a balloon.
It’s proud of its fur, which is fine and delicate. In particular, the curl on its forehead has a texture that’s perfectly heavenly.
It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a BODY SLAM.
It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a body slam.
It sheds its fine fur when the seasons change. The fur is gathered and spun into a luxurious yarn.
The more air it takes in, the more it inflates. If opponents catch it in a bad mood, it will inflate itself to an enormous size to intimidate them.
When it gets angry, it inhales with all its might, and its body gradually inflates. Sometimes they can grow 20 times larger!
Thanks to its bouncy body and fine fur, this Pokémon is sought after. Holding one in your arms while you sleep feels great.
Its fine fur feels sublime to the touch. It can expand its body by inhaling air.
Its fine fur feels so pleasant, those who accidentally touch it cannot take their hands away.
Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won’t want to be separated.
The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.
Its body is full of elasticity. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to inflate itself without limit.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Wigglytuff’s body is very flexible. By inhaling deeply, this Pokémon can inflate itself seemingly without end. Once inflated, Wigglytuff bounces along lightly like a balloon.

pokemon:igglybuff.name: Igglybuff
pokemon:igglybuff.summary: Igglybuff has a soft and plushy body that feels very much like a marshmallow. From this body wafts a gently sweet fragrance that soothes and calms the emotions of its foes.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Igglybuff has a soft and plushy body that feels very much like a marshmallow. From this body wafts a gently sweet fragrance that soothes and calms the emotions of its foes.
It has a soft and bouncy body. Once it starts bouncing, it becomes impossible to stop.
Its body has a faintly sweet scent and is bouncy and soft. If it bounces even once, it cannot stop.
Instead of walking with its short legs, it moves around by bouncing on its soft, tender body.
It has a soft and bouncy body. Once it starts bouncing, it becomes impossible to stop.
Its soft and pliable body is very bouncy. When it sings continuously with all its might, its body steadily turns a deepening pink color.
Its extremely flexible and elastic body makes it bounce continuously--anytime, anywhere.
It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.
It moves by bouncing along. As it moves a lot, it sweats, and its body gives off a sweet aroma.
Igglybuff’s vocal cords are not sufficiently developed. It would hurt its throat if it were to sing too much. This Pokémon gargles with freshwater from a clean stream.
It has a soft and bouncy body. Once it starts bouncing, it becomes impossible to stop.
It has a soft and bouncy body. Once it starts bouncing, it becomes impossible to stop.
IGGLYBUFF’s vocal chords are not sufficiently developed. It would hurt its throat if it were to sing too much. This POKéMON gargles with freshwater from a clean stream.
IGGLYBUFF has a soft and plushy body that feels very much like a marshmallow. From this body wafts a gently sweet fragrance that soothes and calms the emotions of its foes.
Taking advantage of the softness of its body, Igglybuff moves as if bouncing. Its body turns a deep pink when its temperature rises.
Its extremely flexible and elas­ tic body makes it bounce continuous­ ly--anytime, any­ where.
Its extremely flexible and elastic body makes it bounce continuously--anytime, anywhere.
It likes to sing but is not yet good at it. With praise and encouragement, it will get better little by little.
Igglybuff loves to sing. Its marshmallow-like body gives off a faint sweet smell.
Left to its own devices, it will constantly practice singing. You should make it take a break so it doesn’t hurt its throat.
It’s always practicing its singing because it wants to improve. Even when it’s asleep, it keeps singing in its dreams!
It has a soft and bouncy body. Once it starts bouncing, it becomes impossible to stop.
Its body has a faintly sweet scent and is bouncy and soft. If it bounces even once, it cannot stop.
Instead of walking with its short legs, it moves around by bouncing on its soft, tender body.
It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Igglybuff has a soft and plushy body that feels very much like a marshmallow. From this body wafts a gently sweet fragrance that soothes and calms the emotions of its foes.
